name: daily-schedule-tracker
title: Daily Schedule Tracker
description: Track your day through natural dictation. Log activities, sync to Google Sheets, review weekly patterns, and see where your time goes. 1,088 curated activities from 20 research sources. Built for founders and executives.
author: Balaji Renukumar (@1nicornbuilder)

commands.name: log
commands.description: Dictate your day — I'll parse it into structured time entries

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Sync entries to your Google Sheet

commands.name: review
commands.description: Weekly review with targets vs actuals
